tasksEmpty: New tasks would be shown here! (Type help to see available commands)
helpText: commands : help, exit, clear, echo, copy, addtask, removetask, edit, move, done, undone, lang, about
aboutText: Hi, pewnie here! This is a todo app with a terminal-like look. It works on Linux and Windows because I used Electron. Credits to the people and projects that helped shape this app: JetBrains for the JetBrains Mono font, and bash, Alacritty, and Omarchy for the design inspiration.
langUsage: todo: lang list or lang en/pl
langInvalidCode: todo: Language code must have 2 letters.
